title: What Is the Basij?
summary_full: The large, plainclothes militia group is deeply embedded in Iranian society and has been used to crush dissent, often with brutal tactics.
summary_public: The large, plainclothes militia group is deeply embedded in Iranian society and has been used to crush dissent, often with brutal tactics.

IR.label: negative
IR.evidence: used to crush dissent, often with brutal tactics
